TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: O kaacangan no Taywan koni Piwansyawan hananay a romi'ad, marecaday to Pisyongacan, Cing-ming(Pipoyfongan), Twan^o(Pipak-cangan), Cong-yin , ato Cong-ciw a romi'ad, saheto o tadamaanay a romi'ad no misaTaywanay, misaNgayngayay ato misaHolamay. O Piwansyawan a romi'ad i, itiraay i saka safaw lima a romi'ad no saka cecay a folad no mihecahecaan(o katelangay a koyomi ko pinengnengan). Minengneng to masamaamaanay, makapahay a nisanga'an a malikatay a tingkitingki i Piwansyawan, ato mitatamatama to montay a misalama .
S.PHON: o~u kaaʦaŋan no~u tajwan ko~uni piwansjawan ħananaj a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, marəʦaɬ~ɮaj to~u pisjo~uŋaʦan, ʦiŋ-miŋ(pipo~ujfo~uŋan), twanʔo~u(pipak-ʦaŋan), ʦo~uŋ-jin , ato~u ʦo~uŋ-ʦiw a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, saħəto~u o~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ no~u misatajwanaj, misaŋajŋajaj ato~u misaħo~uɾamaj. o~u piwansjawan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i, itiraaj i saka safaw ɾima a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ no~u saka ʦəʦaj a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ no~u miħəʦaħəʦaan(o~u katəɾaŋaj a ko~ujo~umi ko~u pinəŋnəŋan). minəŋnəŋ to~u masamaamaanaj, makapaħaj a nisaŋaʡan a maɾikataj a tiŋkitiŋki i piwansjawan, ato~u mitatamatama to~u mo~untaj a misaɾama .
S.FORM: O kaacangan no Taywan koni Piwansyawan hananay a romi'ad, marecaday to Pisyongacan, Cing-ming(Pipoyfongan), Twan^o(Pipak-cangan), Cong-yin , ato Cong-ciw a romi'ad, saheto o tadamaanay a romi'ad no misaTaywanay, misaNgayngayay ato misaHolamay. O Piwansyawan a romi'ad i, itiraay i saka safaw lima a romi'ad no saka cecay a folad no mihecahecaan(o katelangay a koyomi ko pinengnengan). Minengneng to masamaamaanay, makapahay a nisanga'an a malikatay a tingkitingki i Piwansyawan, ato mitatamatama to montay a misalama .
S.PHON: o~u kaaʦaŋan no~u tajwan ko~uni piwansjawan ħananaj a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, marəʦaɬ~ɮaj to~u pisjo~uŋaʦan, ʦiŋ-miŋ(pipo~ujfo~uŋan), twanʔo~u(pipak-ʦaŋan), ʦo~uŋ-jin , ato~u ʦo~uŋ-ʦiw a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, saħəto~u o~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ no~u misatajwanaj, misaŋajŋajaj ato~u misaħo~uɾamaj. o~u piwansjawan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i, itiraaj i saka safaw ɾima a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ no~u saka ʦəʦaj a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ no~u miħəʦaħəʦaan(o~u katəɾaŋaj a ko~ujo~umi ko~u pinəŋnəŋan). minəŋnəŋ to~u masamaamaanaj, makapaħaj a nisaŋaʡan a maɾikataj a tiŋkitiŋki i piwansjawan, ato~u mitatamatama to~u mo~untaj a misaɾama .
